text: The modern environment of this R+D (Research and Development) showcase fills me with a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The vibrant colors and interactive displays seem to celebrate the ingenuity of human intellect and innovation. I feel at once a participant in ongoing progress and a quiet observer of how thought, labor, and imagination interweave. There is excitement in seeing how ideas are materialized into existence, but also a distance—as if I stand on the precipice of discovery, aware of both possibility and the unknown that still awaits.
